facebook-reels.keyChanges: Facebook Reels algorithm now prioritizes content that drives engagement, encourages longer watch times, and rewards creators for consistency and authenticity. The algorithm also considers user feedback, such as likes, comments, and shares, to determine the relevance and quality of content.
editingTips: Use high-quality audio and visuals to grab attention
Keep Reels concise, ideally between 15-60 seconds
Add text overlays to provide context and clarity
Incorporate music that resonates with your audience
Utilize Facebook's built-in editing features, such as transitions and effects
postingTips: Post Reels during peak hours (3-5 pm EST) for maximum visibility
Aim for 3-5 Reels per week to maintain audience engagement
Space out Reels to avoid overwhelming your audience
Experiment with different posting schedules to find what works best for your audience
titleTips: Use attention-grabbing, descriptive titles that highlight the main content
Include relevant keywords to improve discoverability
Ask questions or make statements that encourage engagement
descriptionTips: Provide context and additional information about the content
Use a clear and concise writing style
Include relevant hashtags to expand reach
End with a call-to-action or a question to encourage engagement
summaries: Boost Engagement with Authentic, Consistent Content
Leverage Music and SoundEffects for Emotional Connection
Get Ahead with Peak Hour Posting and Consistency
Unlock Growth with Attention-Grabbing Titles and Captions
